block_00: Be wise and protect your capital
block_01: Waiting and hoping that your trade can gain just a little bit more before you close it is very dangerous. It is one of the most common mistakes that traders make. Sure, it might be hard to close the deal if the payout is lower than you expected (or if the deal is at a loss).
block_02: However, it is always better to retrieve the little profit you made or to cut your losses short than to let the deal run longer and risk losing the whole investment amount.
block_03: So, how can you know that it is, in fact, the right time for an exit? And what tools and methods are available in order to set the exit conditions in the most convenient way for you?
block_04: Check this extensive guide on why exiting deals is an important component of success in trading and how to determine the correct time to do so.
block_10: Fractal Chaos Bands Indicator: the Guardian of Order
